close_reason: Fixed: unknown params rejected in commit 6ee2289
description: lib.rs:48-70 never inspects parsed.param(). Idiomatic Rust for a constructor that takes a URI is to validate ALL inputs at construction, not just the parts the backend uses today. This is dependent on secretx-core exposing param iteration (avkc.4); when that lands, file backend should iterate and reject any unknown key with InvalidUri. Cross-reference qth2.6 — same issue, idiom lens.
title: from_uri ignores SecretUri::param entirely — should at minimum call .params() (when iteration lands) to reject unknowns
